stat_only_definition_1: N1 = 4 x Nd(single, #theta_{lab} = 20.9 deg, forward branch)
stat_only_definition_2: N2 = 4 x Nd(single, #theta_{lab} = 20.9 deg, backward branch)
stat_only_definition_3: R = N1 / N2; no coincidence gate is used
stat_only_definition_4: Ni = M x Ntarget x Nbeam x #int d#theta d#phi [d#sigma/d#Omega x (1 + #sqrt{2}/2 T20 pzz)]
stat_plus_T_definition_1: N1 = 4 x Nd(single, #theta_{lab} = 20.9 deg, forward branch)
stat_plus_T_definition_2: N2 = 4 x Nd(single, #theta_{lab} = 20.9 deg, backward branch)
stat_plus_T_definition_3: R = N1 / N2; no coincidence gate is used
stat_plus_T_definition_4: Ni = M x Ntarget x Nbeam x #int d#theta d#phi [d#sigma/d#Omega x (1 + #sqrt{2}/2 T20 pzz)]
